mapper.select: SELECT REP_NUM, USER_NUM, CLA_NUM, REP_CONTENT, REP_SAT, REP_REGDATE FROM REPUTATION WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum} ORDER BY REP_REGDATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(REP_NUM) AS totalCount, SUM(REP_SAT) AS sumScore FROM REPUTATION WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPUTATION (REP_NUM, USER_NUM, CLA_NUM, REP_CONTENT, REP_REGDATE) VALUES (SEQ_REPUTATION.NEXTVAL, #{userNum}, #{claNum}, #{repContent}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE REPUTATION SET REP_CONTENT = #{repContent}, REP_SAT = #{repSat}, REP_REGDATE = SYSDATE WHERE REP_NUM = #{repNum}
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_REPUTATION.NEXTVAL AS REP_NUM FROM DUAL

SELECT R.REP_NUM, R.USER_NUM, R.CLA_NUM, R.REP_CONTENT, R.REP_SAT, R.REP_REGDATE, R.REP_CHECK, U.USER_ROLE AS userRole, -- 관리자/사용자 구분용 C.CLA_TITLE AS claTitle FROM REPUTATION R JOIN USERS U ON R.USER_NUM = U.USER_NUM JOIN CLASS C ON R.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE C.USER_NUM = #{userNum} -- 로그인한 강사의 번호
AND (C.CLA_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' OR R.REP_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY R.REP_REGDATE DESC

SELECT COUNT(R.REP_NUM) FROM REPUTATION R JOIN CLASS C ON R.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE C.USER_NUM = #{userNum}
AND (C.CLA_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' OR R.REP_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%')

SELECT R.*, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.USER_ROLE AS userRole, C.CLA_TITLE AS claTitle FROM REPUTATION R JOIN USERS U ON R.USER_NUM = U.USER_NUM JOIN CLASS C ON R.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE R.REP_NUM = #{repNum}
SELECT COUNT(R.REP_NUM) FROM REPUTATION R JOIN CLASS C ON R.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE C.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND R.REP_CHECK = 'N'

SELECT c.cla_num, c.cla_title, ROUND(NVL(AVG(r.rep_sat), 0), 1) AS avgScore, COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_num) AS studentCount FROM class c LEFT JOIN classApply a ON c.cla_num = a.cla_num LEFT JOIN reputation r ON a.cla_num = r.cla_num AND a.user_num = r.user_num WHERE c.user_num = #{userNum} GROUP BY c.cla_num, c.cla_title
